subject: English
skill: Opinion Writing With Reasons and Evidence

lesson.story_mission: Join the Opinion Workshop team to turn strong ideas into convincing Grade 4 paragraphs.
lesson.objective: I can state an opinion, support it with reasons and evidence, use linking words, and write a conclusion.
lesson.concept_explanation: Opinion writing states what you think, supports it with reasons and evidence, connects ideas with linking words, and ends with a conclusion.
lesson.common_misconception: Some writers give a preference without reasons, evidence, or a conclusion.
lesson.real_world_connection: Grade 4 writers use this skill for reading responses, science notes, social studies projects, and stories classmates can follow.
lesson.lesson_summary: Opinion writing states what you think, supports it with reasons and evidence, connects ideas with linking words, and ends with a conclusion.
lesson.mini_lesson: Read the prompt, plan the needed parts, draft a clear answer, and reread with the checklist before you submit.

story.text: Read This Page. Welcome to the Grade 4 writing studio for Opinion Writing With Reasons and Evidence. You will plan, test, revise, and explain choices the way a real author does. Press Start Mission when you are ready to build a clear response.
story.label: Read This Page

lesson.text: Read This Page. This mini lesson teaches i can state an opinion, support it with reasons and evidence, use linking words, and write a conclusion. First, study the model. Then name the parts that make the writing or sentence work. Press Next after you can explain the strategy in your own words.
lesson.label: Read This Page

watch.text: Read This Page. On this Watch page, listen to the teacher think aloud. Notice how the model checks the prompt, chooses useful words, and avoids a common mistake. Press Next to try a supported demo.
watch.label: Read This Page

demo.text: Read This Page. This demo is a safe practice round. Read the sentence or paragraph aloud, point to the evidence in the visual model, and decide what needs to be added or revised. Press Next when you are ready for Practice.
demo.label: Read This Page

practice.text: Read This Page. Practice time. Read the item, use the visual model, and press Read Question if you want the exact prompt read aloud. Use Listen for model sentences, paragraph examples, dialogue, or grammar support before you answer.
practice.label: Read This Page

challenge.text: Read This Page. Challenge time asks you to use i can state an opinion, support it with reasons and evidence, use linking words, and write a conclusion with less help. Press Read Question for the prompt, use Listen when hearing the sentence helps, and check that your response matches every part of the task.
challenge.label: Read This Page

checkpoint.text: Read This Page. Checkpoint time shows what you can do independently. Press Read Question if you want narration and use Listen for model language support. Answer carefully, then review the feedback and misconception notes.
checkpoint.label: Read This Page

badge.text: Read This Page. This badge celebrates your Grade 4 work on Opinion Writing With Reasons and Evidence. You practiced planning, revising, and checking your words for readers. Keep using the strategy in class writing, reading responses, and projects.
badge.label: Read This Page

profile.text: Read This Page. Your profile saves stars, accuracy, hints, and level progress. If one level needs more work, choose Practice This Skill and return to the Skill Practice Center. Strong writers revise one focused skill at a time.
profile.label: Read This Page
